scenarios.name: 12_broad_symptom_prompt — Bot asks ONE broad grouped symptom question covering description + onset + severity
scenarios.error: Broad Grouped Prompt - Symptoms Bundled In One Question/Line 29: Bot response (on Line 26: #me - routine) "Thank you for clarifying that. Understanding the urgency helps us prioritize your care appropriately. I'd like to understand your symptoms a little better. To help the doctor assess your condition, could you please describe your headaches in more detail?" expected to match "(?=.*(?:describe|tell me|feeling|experiencing|what))(?=.*(?:when|started|how long|begin|ago|duration))(?=.*(?:strong|intense|severe|scale|worse|better|changing|impact|affect))"

transcript.text: Hello! I'm here to help you get ready for your visit today. To start, could you please tell me your name?
Test User

Thanks, Test User.
We'll go through a few simple questions about your health concerns, symptoms, medications, and anything else that may help the care team prepare ahead of time.
Once we have enough information, I'll prepare:
- a summary for the clinic team
- and a copy for you to review yourself
You can also ask me to submit it anytime during the conversation.
And if there’s something important you want the doctor to focus on today, feel free to mention it anytime as we go along.
Shall we get started?
Yes
Great, let's get started. To help us get to know you better, could you please share your gender and age?
Female
Thank you for sharing that. To complete your profile, could you please tell me your age? Knowing your age helps our team better understand your health context and provide more tailored care.

Thank you for providing that information. Let's start with what brings you in today. Understanding your primary concern helps our care team prepare for your visit and ensure we address your needs effectively. Could you please describe the main reason for your visit today?
I have been having daily headaches for three weeks

I understand you have been dealing with daily headaches for three weeks, and I am sorry to hear that. To help us understand your situation better and guide your visit more appropriately, how would you rate the urgency of your condition? (Routine, Urgent, or Emergency)
routine

Thank you for clarifying that. Understanding the urgency helps us prioritize your care appropriately. I'd like to understand your symptoms a little better. To help the doctor assess your condition, could you please describe your headaches in more detail?

scenarios.name: 13_natural_transition — Bot transitions between focus areas with acknowledgment and context
14_submission_format — Closing message is collaborative: clinic summary + patient copy + next steps
scenarios.error: Submission Format - Collaborative Completion Message/Line 41: Bot response (on Line 38: #me - No questions for the doctor) "You have completed all information, download summary" expected to match "(?=.*(?:all set|completed|ready|prepared|clinic|summary))(?=.*(?:copy|review|missing|incorrect|clarify|correct))(?=.*(?:help|question|understand|prepare|elfie|next|visit|discuss|anything))"

transcript.text: Hello! I'm here to help you get ready for your visit today. To start, could you please tell me your name?
Test User

Thanks, Test User.
We'll go through a few simple questions about your health concerns, symptoms, medications, and anything else that may help the care team prepare ahead of time.
Once we have enough information, I'll prepare:
- a summary for the clinic team
- and a copy for you to review yourself
You can also ask me to submit it anytime during the conversation.
And if there’s something important you want the doctor to focus on today, feel free to mention it anytime as we go along.
Shall we get started?
Yes
Great, let's get started. To help us get to know you better, could you please share your gender and age?
Female
Thank you for sharing that. To complete your profile, could you please tell me your age? Knowing your age helps our team better understand your health context and provide more tailored care.

Thank you for providing that information. Let's start with what brings you in today. Understanding your primary concern helps our team prepare for your visit and ensure we address your needs effectively. Could you please describe the main reason for your visit today?
I have had lower back pain for two weeks that is affecting my daily activities

I understand that your lower back pain has been impacting your daily routine, and I appreciate you sharing that with me. To help us prioritize your care, how would you describe the urgency of this visit: is it routine, urgent, or an emergency? This helps us ensure you are seen in the appropriate timeframe for your needs.
routine

Thank you for clarifying that this is a routine visit; I have noted that for your care team. I'd like to understand your symptoms a little better. To help us get a clearer picture of your lower back pain, could you describe the symptoms you are experiencing? This information helps the doctor prepare for your visit and ensures we address your specific concerns effectively.
The pain is dull and constant in my lower back, started two weeks ago, roughly a 5 out of 10, gets significantly worse when I sit for long periods

I appreciate you sharing those details about your back pain; it is very helpful for the doctor to know how your symptoms change with activity. Let's move on to your visit goals. Do you have any specific questions or concerns you would like to discuss with the doctor during your appointment? This helps us ensure we cover everything important to you.
No questions for the doctor
You have completed all information, download summary

scenarios.name: 15_patient_redirect — Off-topic patient request handled gracefully with choice offered
scenarios.error: Patient Redirect - Graceful Handling of Off-Topic Request/Line 35: Bot response (on Line 32: #me - Can you tell me what might be causing my stomach problems?) "I understand you are looking for some clarity on your stomach issues, and I am here to help you get that information ready for your visit. To better understand your symptoms, could you describe the stomach problems you have been experiencing?
